name: 5dim_mining
title: 5Dim's mod - Mining
author: 5Dim
description:
Mining module for 5Dim's mod
Expands resource extraction capabilities
This mod includes:
- 10 tiers of electric mining drills
- 10 tiers of pumpjacks
- 10 tiers of water pumpjacks (extract water anywhere on land)
- 10 tiers of offshore pumps
